title: Configurable label constraints (enums, patterns, required) + strict init defaults + config schema
description:
Harden label convention enforcement. Plan: /home/vkaskivuo/.claude/plans/ancient-plotting-rossum.md

Scope:
1. Extend NamespaceConfig with values (enum), pattern (regex), required (bool) fields.
2. jit validate surfaces enum/pattern/required violations + near-duplicate namespace hints.
3. jit init writes strict defaults (reject_malformed_labels=true, enforce_namespace_registry=true) for new repos.
4. jit config show --json exposes the full namespace registry (mirrors server /config/namespaces shape).

Critical files: crates/jit/src/config.rs, config_manager.rs, commands/validate.rs, hierarchy_templates.rs, main.rs; docs/reference/labels.md.

Deferred follow-ups tracked separately: default-value auto-apply, deprecation/alias rewriting, reference validation (epic:<slug> resolves to real epic), hard rejection at add-label time, max cardinality, labels-valid gate, retroactive defaults for existing repos.
